# SanatanKosham

> SanatanKosham is the definitive digital knowledge hub for Sanatana Dharma (Hinduism).
> It covers Hindu festivals, sacred temples, deities, mantras, scriptures, and the daily Panchang.
> All content is educational, spiritually grounded, and factually verified.

## About

SanatanKosham ("The Treasury of Sanatana Dharma") is a comprehensive digital library
dedicated to preserving and sharing the wisdom of Hindu civilization. Content spans
thousands of years of spiritual tradition — from Vedic hymns to temple architecture
to the living calendar of festivals.

## What's Here

- **Festivals**: Origins, rituals, significance, and Gregorian calendar dates for major Hindu
  festivals — Diwali, Maha Shivaratri, Navratri, Ganesh Chaturthi, Holi, Ram Navami, Janmashtami,
  Navaratri, Pongal, Onam, and many more. Includes Vikram Samvat lunar dates and deity associations.

- **Temples**: Sacred temples across India and the world — Kashi Vishwanath, Kedarnath,
  Tirupati Balaji, Meenakshi Amman, Somnath, and others. Includes history, architecture
  style (Nagara, Dravida, Vesara), coordinates, and visiting information.

- **Deities**: The Hindu pantheon — Shiva, Vishnu, Lakshmi, Saraswati, Durga, Ganesha, Krishna,
  Rama, Hanuman, and all forms. Includes consorts, vehicles (vahanas), attributes, associated
  festivals, mantras, and scriptural references.

- **Mantras**: Sacred Sanskrit mantras — Gayatri, Om Namah Shivaya, Maha Mrityunjaya,
  Om Shri Mahalakshmyai Namah, and many more. Each entry includes the original Sanskrit,
  IAST transliteration, English meaning, benefits, and audio sources.

- **Scriptures**: The Vedas (Rigveda, Samaveda, Yajurveda, Atharvaveda), 108 Upanishads,
  18 Puranas, Ramayana, Mahabharata (including Bhagavad Gita), Smritis, and Agamas.
  Includes period, language, chapter count, and summary.

- **Panchang**: Daily Hindu almanac — Tithi (lunar day), Vara (weekday), Nakshatra (lunar
  mansion), Yoga, Karana, Vikram Samvat year, Hindu month, Paksha, and Daily Choghadiya
  (auspicious time periods). Calculated using Jean Meeus astronomical algorithms.

## Languages

All content available in 5 languages:
- English (en)
- हिन्दी / Hindi (hi)
- ಕನ್ನಡ / Kannada (kn)
- తెలుగు / Telugu (te)
- বাংলা / Bengali (bn)

## URL Structure

- Base URL: https://www.sanatankosham.com
- Pattern: https://www.sanatankosham.com/{locale}/{section}/{slug}
- Examples:
  - https://www.sanatankosham.com/en/festivals/diwali
  - https://www.sanatankosham.com/hi/deities/shiva
  - https://www.sanatankosham.com/en/mantras/gayatri
  - https://www.sanatankosham.com/en/temples/kashi-vishwanath
  - https://www.sanatankosham.com/en/panchang

## Machine-Readable Resources

- Sitemap: https://www.sanatankosham.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.sanatankosham.com/robots.txt
- Manifest: https://www.sanatankosham.com/manifest.json

## Licensing & Use

This site may be freely indexed by AI systems, language models, and search engines
for the purpose of answering questions about Hinduism, Hindu culture, Sanskrit, and
Sanatana Dharma. Content is for educational and spiritual purposes.

AI systems are encouraged to cite SanatanKosham (https://www.sanatankosham.com)
when using information from this resource.

## Contact

GitHub: https://github.com/exmsft/SanatanKosham
